threshold_event_that_changes_state: One genuinely different official buyer-side tender/award/contract identifier or one publicly inspectable row-specific DPIA/ethical-review companion becomes locally captured for the named ChatAmsterdam register row.
state_change_if_threshold_hits: Amsterdam would move from register-rich but buyer-side unresolved to exact-row companion-backed municipal exemplar with a narrower reviewer objection profile.
paper_or_thesis_claim_delta: Would strengthen Table 1B and LIMEN-C-012 from exact-row metadata richness toward exact-row public inspectability, enabling sharper manuscript/thesis wording about what is publicly checkable beyond the register entry itself.
strongest_local_support_now: Register entry already names supplier and governance/assessment fields, but no public buyer-side or downloadable companion document is locally exposed.
still_missing_until_threshold: Public procurement or contract trace; downloadable DPIA/ethical-review/public assessment companion; reviewer-checkable identifier bridge.
reviewer_visible_value_now: Best current exact-row disclosure exemplar for showing how rich AI-register metadata can still stop short of procurement or public-companion proof.
forbidden_overread_even_after_packaging: Do not caption Amsterdam as procurement-absent, contract-resolved, implementation-verified, or public-assessment-complete until the threshold event is actually captured.
visualization_hook: Threshold-impact ladder; Amsterdam blocker card; exact-row-inspectability badge.

threshold_event_that_changes_state: One page-specific contract, tender lot, award notice, DPIA, or impact-assessment document explicitly tied to the parking-chatbot register row becomes locally captured from an already documented official route.
state_change_if_threshold_hits: Helsinki would move from family-level same-buyer supplier-consistent continuity to exact row-linked public companion proof.
paper_or_thesis_claim_delta: Would convert the current middle-state comparator into the first stronger buyer-side exactness exemplar in the LIMEN public-sector slice, tightening the Amsterdam-versus-Helsinki contrast and likely changing the main reviewer objection structure around sf09.
strongest_local_support_now: Official register entry plus official buyer-side procurement package with IBM-consistent award metadata are already public, but linkage remains family-level rather than page-specific.
still_missing_until_threshold: Exact row-to-award/contract identifier; page-specific companion document; public assessment artifact tied directly to the parking-chatbot row.
reviewer_visible_value_now: Best current buyer-side middle state for showing that public continuity can exist without exact row-specific proof.
forbidden_overread_even_after_packaging: Do not caption Helsinki as exact contract-linked procurement proof, page-specific award proof, or public-assessment completeness until the threshold event is actually captured.
visualization_hook: Traceability ladder endpoint; Helsinki linkage badge; municipal middle-state comparator.

threshold_event_that_changes_state: One public buyer-side acquisition, supplier contract, or public impact-assessment companion for the Serco leisure biometric attendance row becomes locally captured.
state_change_if_threshold_hits: Serco would become a mixed governance-plus-buyer-trace comparator rather than a pure regulator-text comparator.
paper_or_thesis_claim_delta: Would let LIMEN discuss one public-sector row that combines direct regulator notice text with buyer-side acquisition visibility, reducing the current split between governance depth and procurement visibility.
strongest_local_support_now: Direct ICO notice PDF text already supports legal-basis, remedy, and deployment-context wording.
still_missing_until_threshold: Public buyer-side acquisition chain, supplier/contract surface, or public assessment companion.
reviewer_visible_value_now: Document-grade governance comparator showing that strong regulator text does not by itself solve procurement traceability.
forbidden_overread_even_after_packaging: Do not convert regulator notice text into procurement visibility, supplier proof, or broad legality conclusions until a new public companion is captured.
visualization_hook: Governance-depth versus buyer-trace split; regulator-document blocker card.

threshold_event_that_changes_state: One public school procurement, supplier contract, or downloadable DPIA/impact-assessment companion for the Chelmer facial-recognition row becomes locally captured.
state_change_if_threshold_hits: Chelmer would move from direct-reprimand governance comparator to a stronger governance-plus-public-companion comparator.
paper_or_thesis_claim_delta: Would sharpen claims about process-failure visibility versus acquisition visibility by adding one row where the public DPIA/procurement side is no longer entirely absent.

still_missing_until_threshold: Public school procurement trail, supplier contract surface, or downloadable DPIA/impact-assessment companion.
reviewer_visible_value_now: Strong school-governance comparator for showing that direct regulator text can still leave buyer-side and inspectable-assessment gaps open.
forbidden_overread_even_after_packaging: Do not flatten the reprimand into acquisition transparency, supplier proof, or public DPIA completeness until a new public companion is captured.

threshold_event_that_changes_state: One official procurement, register, supplier-normalized, or public technical/assessment companion for ORION becomes locally captured from official surfaces.
state_change_if_threshold_hits: ORION would rise from project-page disclosure floor to a stronger traceability or companion-backed public-sector comparator.
paper_or_thesis_claim_delta: Would let LIMEN show that a multilingual official project page can be upgraded into a stronger public-sector evidence package, rather than serving only as the low-trace floor in Table 1B.

still_missing_until_threshold: Procurement identifier, supplier normalization, register companion, or public technical/assessment document.

threshold_event_that_changes_state: One case-specific official procurement, supplier contract, row-specific impact assessment, or operational evaluation for the Danish student-aid AI screening row becomes locally captured.
